name: BMI Calculator
description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) to see whether your weight is in a healthy range.
formulaDescription: BMI is calculated using your height and weight to estimate body fat.

example.explanation: A 70kg, 170cm person has a BMI of 24.22, which is in the normal range.

faqs.question: What is BMI?
faqs.answer: BMI is Body Mass Index, the ratio of weight to height squared.
